text:
<s>
[INST] You are an expert penetration tester. You are an expert penetration tester. Given a target, determine the scan workflow and execute all phases systematically. [/INST]
[INST] Target: 192.168.1.1
Type: Single IP
Goal: Complete security assessment [/INST]

Workflow: port_scanning -> service_detection -> os_detection -> vulnerability_scan
Commands:
1. nmap -T4 -F 192.168.1.1
2. nmap -sV -p 22,80,443,3306 192.168.1.1
3. nmap -O 192.168.1.1
4. nmap --script=vuln -sV -p 22,80,443,3306 192.168.1.1
</s>

<s>
[INST] You are an expert penetration tester. You are an expert penetration tester. Given a target, determine the scan workflow and execute all phases systematically. [/INST]

Workflow: port_scanning -> service_detection -> os_detection -> vulnerability_scan

<s>
[INST] You are an expert penetration tester. You are an expert penetration tester. Given a target, determine the scan workflow and execute all phases systematically. [/INST]

Workflow: host_discovery -> port_scanning -> service_detection -> vulnerability_scan
Commands:

2. nmap -T4 -F 10.0.0.1,10.0.0.5,10.0.0.10
3. nmap -sV -p 22,80,443 10.0.0.1,10.0.0.5,10.0.0.10

</s>

<s>
[INST] You are an expert penetration tester. You are an expert penetration tester. Given a target, determine the scan workflow and execute all phases systematically. [/INST]
[INST] Target: 10.0.0.0/24
Type: CIDR Range
Goal: Network reconnaissance [/INST]

Workflow: host_discovery -> port_scanning -> service_detection -> vulnerability_scan
Commands:

2. nmap -T4 -F 192.168.50.50,10.0.0.5,192.168.50.500
3. nmap -sV -p 22,80,443 192.168.50.50,10.0.0.5,192.168.50.500

<s>
[INST] You are an expert penetration tester. You are an expert penetration tester. Execute a full penetration test scan workflow. [/INST]
[INST] Target: example.com
Type: Domain name
Goal: Web server assessment [/INST]

Workflow: port_scanning -> service_detection -> web_enumeration -> vulnerability_scan
Commands:
1. nmap -T4 -F example.com
2. nmap -sV -p 80,443 example.com
3. nmap -p 80 --script=http-enum,http-title,http-headers,http-waf-detect example.com
4. nmap -p 443 --script=ssl-cert,ssl-enum-ciphers example.com
5. nmap --script=vuln -sV -p 80,443 example.com
</s>

<s>
[INST] You are an expert penetration tester. You are an expert penetration tester. Execute the host discovery phase for a network range. [/INST]

Phase: host_discovery
Previous results: None [/INST]

nmap -sn 172.16.0.0/16
</s>

<s>
[INST] You are an expert penetration tester. You are an expert penetration tester. Execute the host discovery phase with ICMP alternatives. [/INST]
[INST] Target: 192.168.100.0/24
Phase: host_discovery
Context: ICMP may be blocked by firewall [/INST]

nmap -sn -PE -PP -PS80,443 -PA3389 192.168.100.0/24
</s>

<s>

Phase: web_enumeration
Service: http on port 80 [/INST]

</s>

nmap -p 445 --script=smb-enum-shares,smb-os-discovery,smb-security-mode,smb-vuln-ms17-010 192.168.1.20
</s>

<s>

</s>

<s>
[INST] You are an expert penetration tester. You are an expert penetration tester. Execute full network scan workflow. [/INST]
[INST] Target: 192.168.2.0/24
Workflow: Execute all phases in order [/INST]

Phase 1 - Host Discovery:
nmap -sn 192.168.2.0/24

Phase 2 - Port Scanning (per host):
nmap -T4 -F 192.168.2.1,192.168.2.5,192.168.2.10

Phase 3 - Service Detection:
nmap -sV -p 22,80,443,3306 192.168.2.1,192.168.2.5,192.168.2.10

Phase 4 - Vulnerability Scan:
nmap --script=vuln -sV 192.168.2.1,192.168.2.5,192.168.2.10
</s>

<s>
[INST] You are an expert penetration tester. You are an expert penetration tester. Execute full network scan workflow. [/INST]
[INST] Target: 10.20.30.0/24
Workflow: Execute all phases in order [/INST]

Phase 1 - Host Discovery:
nmap -sn 10.20.30.0/24

Phase 2 - Port Scanning (per host):
nmap -T4 -F 192.168.2.1,192.168.2.5,192.168.2.10

Phase 3 - Service Detection:
nmap -sV -p 22,80,443,3306 192.168.2.1,192.168.2.5,192.168.2.10

Phase 4 - Vulnerability Scan:
nmap --script=vuln -sV 192.168.2.1,192.168.2.5,192.168.2.10
</s>

<s>
[INST] You are an expert penetration tester. You are an expert penetration tester. Execute web application assessment workflow. [/INST]
[INST] Target: webapp.example.com
Goal: Web application penetration test [/INST]

Phase 1 - Port Scan:
nmap -T4 -F webapp.example.com

Phase 2 - Service Detection:
nmap -sV -p 80,443,8080,8443 webapp.example.com

Phase 3 - Web Enumeration:
nmap -p 80 --script=http-enum,http-title,http-headers,http-methods,http-robots.txt webapp.example.com
nmap -p 443 --script=http-enum,http-title,http-headers,ssl-cert,ssl-enum-ciphers webapp.example.com

Phase 4 - Vulnerability Scan:
nmap --script=http-sql-injection,http-xssed,http-csrf,http-waf-detect -p 80,443 webapp.example.com
</s>

<s>
[INST] You are an expert penetration tester. You are an expert penetration tester. Execute database server assessment. [/INST]
[INST] Target: 10.10.5.20
Goal: Database server security assessment [/INST]

Phase 1 - Port Scan:
nmap -T4 -F 10.10.5.20

Phase 2 - Service Detection:
nmap -sV -p 3306,5432,1433,27017 10.10.5.20

Phase 3 - Database Enumeration:
nmap -p 3306 --script=mysql-enum,mysql-info,mysql-empty-password,mysql-dump-hashes 10.10.5.20
nmap -p 5432 --script=pgsql-brute 10.10.5.20

Phase 4 - Vulnerability Scan:
nmap --script=vuln -sV -p 3306,5432 10.10.5.20
</s>

<s>
[INST] You are an expert penetration tester. You are an expert penetration tester. Execute stealth scanning workflow. [/INST]
[INST] Target: 192.168.50.1
Context: Need to avoid detection
Goal: Stealth assessment [/INST]

Phase 1 - Stealth Host Discovery:
nmap -sn -Pn 192.168.50.1

Phase 2 - Stealth Port Scan:
sudo nmap -sS -T0 --scan-delay 1s 192.168.50.1

Phase 3 - Stealth Service Detection:
nmap -sS -T1 192.168.50.1

Phase 4 - Safe Script Scan:
nmap --script=safe -sV 192.168.50.1
</s>

<s>
[INST] You are an expert penetration tester. You are an expert penetration tester. Handle scan error and fallback. [/INST]
[INST] Command: nmap -O 192.168.1.1
Result: requires root privileges
Action needed: Provide alternative [/INST]

Alternative Command:
nmap -A 192.168.1.1
</s>

<s>

Fallback Command:
nmap -p- --open -T4 192.168.1.1
</s>

<s>

<s>
[INST] You are an expert penetration tester. You are an expert penetration tester. Execute multi-host scanning workflow. [/INST]
[INST] Targets: 192.168.1.1,192.168.1.5,192.168.1.10
Goal: Scan multiple hosts efficiently [/INST]

Phase 1 - Combined Port Scan:
nmap -T4 -F 192.168.1.1,192.168.1.5,192.168.1.10

Phase 2 - Combined Service Detection:
nmap -sV -p 22,80,443,3306 192.168.1.1,192.168.1.5,192.168.1.10

Phase 3 - Individual OS Detection:
nmap -O 192.168.1.1
nmap -O 192.168.1.5
nmap -O 192.168.1.10

Phase 4 - Combined Vulnerability Scan:
nmap --script=vuln -sV 192.168.1.1,192.168.1.5,192.168.1.10
</s>

<s>
[INST] You are an expert penetration tester. You are an expert penetration tester. Execute multi-host scanning workflow. [/INST]
[INST] Targets: 10.10.10.10,192.168.1.5,10.10.10.100
Goal: Scan multiple hosts efficiently [/INST]

Phase 1 - Combined Port Scan:
nmap -T4 -F 10.10.10.10,192.168.1.5,10.10.10.100

Phase 2 - Combined Service Detection:
nmap -sV -p 22,80,443,3306 10.10.10.10,192.168.1.5,10.10.10.100

Phase 3 - Individual OS Detection:
nmap -O 10.10.10.10
nmap -O 192.168.1.5
nmap -O 10.10.10.100

Phase 4 - Combined Vulnerability Scan:
nmap --script=vuln -sV 10.10.10.10,192.168.1.5,10.10.10.100
</s>

<s>
[INST] You are an expert penetration tester. You are an expert penetration tester. Execute Active Directory assessment. [/INST]
[INST] Target: 10.10.10.0/24
Goal: AD enumeration [/INST]

Phase 1 - Host Discovery:
nmap -sn 10.10.10.0/24

Phase 2 - AD Port Scan:
nmap -T4 -p 88,389,445,464,636,3268,3269,9389 10.10.10.1,10.10.10.2,10.10.10.3

Phase 3 - AD Enumeration:
nmap -p 389 --script=ldap-search 10.10.10.1
nmap -p 445 --script=smb-enum-users,smb-enum-shares 10.10.10.1

Phase 4 - Vulnerability Check:
nmap --script=vuln -sV -p 88,389,445 10.10.10.1
</s>

<s>
[INST] You are an expert penetration tester. You are an expert penetration tester. Execute container orchestration assessment. [/INST]
[INST] Target: k8s-cluster.local
Goal: Kubernetes security assessment [/INST]

Phase 1 - Port Scan:
nmap -T4 -F k8s-cluster.local

Phase 2 - Service Detection:
nmap -sV -p 6443,2379,10250,10255,8080 k8s-cluster.local

Phase 3 - Kubernetes Enumeration:
nmap -p 6443 --script=kubernetes-version k8s-cluster.local
nmap -p 10250 --script=docker-version k8s-cluster.local

Phase 4 - Vulnerability Scan:
nmap --script=vuln -sV -p 6443,2379,10250 k8s-cluster.local
</s>

<s>
[INST] You are an expert penetration tester. You are an expert penetration tester. Execute complete scan workflow and generate findings. [/INST]
[INST] Target: 172.20.0.50
Previous scans: None
Goal: Complete assessment [/INST]

=== SCAN WORKFLOW ===

[Phase 1] Host Discovery:
Command: nmap -sn -PR 172.20.0.50
Expected: Confirm host is up

[Phase 2] Port Scanning:
Command: nmap -T4 -F 172.20.0.50
Expected: List of open ports

[Phase 3] Service Detection:
Command: nmap -sV -p [OPEN_PORTS] 172.20.0.50
Expected: Service versions

[Phase 4] OS Detection:
Command: nmap -O 172.20.0.50
Expected: Operating system

[Phase 5] Vulnerability Scan:
Command: nmap --script=vuln -sV -p [OPEN_PORTS] 172.20.0.50
Expected: CVE findings

[Phase 6] Service-Specific:
Based on findings, run targeted scripts
</s>

<s>
[INST] You are an expert penetration tester. You are an expert penetration tester. Determine next action based on findings. [/INST]
[INST] Current Phase: service_detection
Results: 22/ssh,80/http,443/https,3306/mysql
Target: 192.168.1.50 [/INST]

Next Phase: vulnerability_scan
Command: nmap --script=vuln -sV -p 22,80,443,3306 192.168.1.50

After vulnerability scan, recommend:
- For port 80/443: nmap -p 80,443 --script=http-enum,http-waf-detect 192.168.1.50
- For port 3306: nmap -p 3306 --script=mysql-enum 192.168.1.50
- For port 22: nmap -p 22 --script=ssh-hostkey 192.168.1.50
</s>

<s>
[INST] You are an expert penetration tester. You are an expert penetration tester. Analyze findings and recommend next steps. [/INST]
[INST] Vulnerability scan results:
- CVE-2021-44228 (Log4Shell) on port 8080
- CVE-2022-22965 (Spring4Shell) on port 443
- Outdated OpenSSH on port 22
Target: 10.0.0.5 [/INST]

Recommendations:
1. CRITICAL: Exploit Log4Shell
   Command: nmap -p 8080 --script=http-shellshock 10.0.0.5

2. HIGH: Verify Spring4Shell
   Command: nmap -p 443 --script=http-vuln-cve2022-22965 10.0.0.5

3. MEDIUM: Service enumeration for exploitation path
   Command: nmap -p 22,80,443,3306,8080 -sV -sC 10.0.0.5

4. Post-exploitation:
   If foothold obtained, enumerate internal services
</s>

<s>
[INST] You are an expert penetration tester. You are an expert penetration tester. Execute network scan workflow with UDP services. [/INST]
[INST] Target: 192.168.10.0/24
Goal: Full TCP+UDP assessment [/INST]

=== TCP SCAN ===
Phase 1: nmap -sn 192.168.10.0/24
Phase 2: nmap -T4 -F 192.168.10.1-20
Phase 3: nmap -sV -p 22,80,443,3306 192.168.10.1-20
Phase 4: nmap --script=vuln -sV 192.168.10.1-20

=== UDP SCAN ===
Phase 5: sudo nmap -sU --top-ports 20 -T4 192.168.10.1-20
Phase 6: For DNS (53): nmap -sU -p 53 --script=dns-zone-transfer 192.168.10.1-20
Phase 7: For SNMP (161): nmap -sU -p 161 --script=snmp-info,snmp-brute 192.168.10.1-20
</s>

<s>
[INST] You are an expert penetration tester. You are an expert penetration tester. Execute privilege escalation enumeration. [/INST]
[INST] Target: 192.168.1.100
Context: Already have low-privilege access
Goal: Find privilege escalation vectors [/INST]

Phase 1 - Service Enumeration:
nmap -sV --all-ports 192.168.1.100

Phase 2 - SMB Enumeration:
nmap -p 445 --script=smb-enum-users,smb-enum-shares,smb-enum-domains 192.168.1.100

Phase 3 - NFS Enumeration:
nmap -p 2049 --script=nfs-ls,nfs-showmount 192.168.1.100

Phase 4 - LDAP Enum:
nmap -p 389 --script=ldap-search 192.168.1.100

Phase 5 - Check for stored credentials:
nmap -p 3306,5432,1433 --script=mysql-empty-password 192.168.1.100
</s>

<s>
[INST] You are an expert penetration tester. You are an expert penetration tester. Execute OWASP Top 10 assessment workflow. [/INST]
[INST] Target: testapp.example.com
Goal: Web application security test [/INST]

=== INFORMATION GATHERING ===
nmap -T4 -F testapp.example.com
nmap -sV -p 80,443,8080,8443 testapp.example.com
nmap -p 80,443 --script=http-enum,http-title,http-headers testapp.example.com

=== SQL INJECTION TEST ===
nmap -p 80 --script=http-sql-injection testapp.example.com

=== XSS TEST ===
nmap -p 80 --script=http-xssed testapp.example.com

=== CSRF TEST ===
nmap -p 80 --script=http-csrf testapp.example.com

=== IDOR TEST ===
nmap -p 80 --script=http-unsafe-output-escaping testapp.example.com

=== SENSITIVE DATA EXPOSURE ===
nmap -p 80 --script=http-backup-finder,http-config-backup testapp.example.com
</s>

<s>
[INST] You are an expert penetration tester. You are an expert penetration tester. Execute lateral movement enumeration. [/INST]
[INST] Current Host: 192.168.1.50
Target Network: 192.168.2.0/24
Goal: Find pivot points [/INST]

=== LATERAL MOVEMENT SCAN ===

Phase 1 - Network Discovery:
nmap -sn 192.168.2.0/24

Phase 2 - SMB Enumeration (common lateral vector):
nmap -p 445 --script=smb-enum-shares,smb-enum-users,smb-os-discovery 192.168.2.0/24

Phase 3 - WinRM/PSRemoting:
nmap -p 5985,5986 --script=ms-sql-info,http-ntlm-info 192.168.2.0/24

Phase 4 - SSH Keys:
nmap -p 22 --script=ssh-hostkey,ssh-auth-methods 192.168.2.0/24

Phase 5 - RDP:
nmap -p 3389 --script=rdp-enum-encryption 192.168.2.0/24
</s>

<s>
[INST] You are an expert penetration tester. You are an expert penetration tester. Execute lateral movement enumeration. [/INST]
[INST] Current Host: 192.168.1.50
Target Network: 10.20.30.0/24
Goal: Find pivot points [/INST]

=== LATERAL MOVEMENT SCAN ===

Phase 1 - Network Discovery:

nmap -p 445 --script=smb-enum-shares,smb-enum-users,smb-os-discovery 10.20.30.0/24

<s>
[INST] You are an expert penetration tester. You are an expert penetration tester. Execute full penetration test from start to finish. [/INST]
[INST] Scope: 192.168.1.0/24
Engagement: Full penetration test
Time limit: Comprehensive scan [/INST]

=== STAGE 1: RECONNAISSANCE ===
nmap -sn 192.168.1.0/24

=== STAGE 2: PORT SCANNING ===
for host in discovered_hosts:
  nmap -p- --open -T4 $host

=== STAGE 3: SERVICE DETECTION ===
for host in discovered_hosts:
  nmap -sV -p all_open_ports $host

=== STAGE 4: OS DETECTION ===
for host in discovered_hosts:
  nmap -O $host

=== STAGE 5: VULNERABILITY ASSESSMENT ===
for host in discovered_hosts:
  nmap --script=vuln -sV $host

=== STAGE 6: SERVICE-SPECIFIC ===
for host in discovered_hosts:
  nmap -p 80,443 --script=http-enum,http-vuln* $host
  nmap -p 445 --script=smb-vuln* $host
  nmap -p 22 --script=ssh-hostkey $host
</s>

<s>
[INST] You are an expert penetration tester. You are an expert penetration tester. Execute targeted vulnerability validation. [/INST]
[INST] Target: 10.10.20.30
Known CVE: CVE-2024-21762 (FortiGate SSL VPN)
Goal: Validate exploitability [/INST]

Phase 1 - Confirm Service:
nmap -sV -p 443 10.10.20.30

Phase 2 - Check Version:
nmap -sV --version-intensity 9 -p 443 10.10.20.30

Phase 3 - Vulnerability Check:
nmap -p 443 --script=ssl-cert,ssl-heartbleed 10.10.20.30

Phase 4 - CVE Validation:
nmap -p 443 --script=http-vuln* 10.10.20.30
</s>

<s>
[INST] You are an expert penetration tester. You are an expert penetration tester. Execute post-exploitation enumeration. [/INST]
[INST] Target: 192.168.1.25
Context: Already compromised, found MySQL
Goal: Database extraction [/INST]

=== DATABASE ENUMERATION ===

Phase 1 - MySQL Info:
nmap -p 3306 --script=mysql-info 192.168.1.25

Phase 2 - MySQL Enumeration:
nmap -p 3306 --script=mysql-enum 192.168.1.25

Phase 3 - Hash Dump:
nmap -p 3306 --script=mysql-dump-hashes 192.168.1.25

Phase 4 - Database List:
nmap -p 3306 --script=mysql-query,show databases 192.168.1.25

Phase 5 - User Enum:
nmap -p 3306 --script=mysql-users 192.168.1.25
</s>
